plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Addis Ride uses your location to track the shuttle you're on and to navigate to your stop.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Addis Ride uses your location to track the shuttle you're on.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Addis Ride uses your location to track the shuttle you're on and to navigate to your stop.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Addis Ride uses your location to track the shuttle you're on.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Addis Ride uses your location in the background to report shuttle positions for riders waiting at stops.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Addis Ride uses Face ID to unlock the app for your security.
